Solana Testnet
Private coordination
Public verification
Confidential Coordination Infrastructure for Organizations on Solana

Your organization runs on public wallets, public votes, and public treasury activity.

PrivateDAO helps organizations coordinate sensitive decisions privately, then reveal outcomes and execution proof when transparency protects trust.

Try Testnet workflowWhy PrivateDAO
No code
Wallet-first
Proof-linked
Governance is the first use case
One simple operating flow
Step 1

Intelligence before signing

Understand treasury context, risk, and public evidence before making a decision.

Step 2

Private coordination

Keep vote momentum, reviewer opinions, and sensitive operating details private while they matter.

Step 3

Public verification

Reveal the outcome, execution receipt, and proof route when the workflow is complete.

Verify proofPilot program
Why now?
DAO treasuries are growing faster than governance infrastructure.
Sensitive coordination still happens in private chats and spreadsheets.
Solana organizations increasingly need privacy without sacrificing verifiability.
Business value

Privacy is not the product outcome. Better organizational decisions are.

PrivateDAO helps organizations reduce strategy leakage, shorten operational handoffs, preserve institutional memory, and produce evidence that stakeholders can verify.

Sensitive strategy leaks before a decision is finished.

Keep vote momentum, reviewer opinions, payroll details, and treasury intent private until disclosure is useful.

Approvals disappear across chats, spreadsheets, and trusted operators.

Connect review, approval, execution, and proof in one workflow that survives contributor and leadership changes.

Public wallets expose operating patterns to competitors and counterparties.

Reduce unnecessary operational exposure while preserving public accountability after completion.

Teams spend time rebuilding context for auditors, grants, and stakeholders.

Export proof-linked outcomes and execution receipts instead of reconstructing the decision after the fact.

DAO operators

Run governance, grants, treasury requests, and emergency approvals with less coordination leakage.

Protocol and foundation teams

Protect sensitive operational work while keeping final actions verifiable on Solana.

Grant and review committees

Preserve reviewer independence, then publish the award outcome and proof.

Contributor-led organizations

Coordinate payroll, rewards, and vendor payouts without exposing every internal detail.

Try the Testnet workflowView pricingInvestor overview
Choose a service to try

Start with the pain, pick the service, run the Testnet path.

PrivateDAO is not a maze of integrations. Choose governance, rooms, treasury, payouts, intelligence, or GamingDAO, then continue directly into the wallet-first flow and proof route.

Try the fastest flow

DAO Governance

Public vote counts, whale signals, and visible momentum influence members before the vote ends.

Create a DAO, join a live vote, or start a VIP room with private voting and public reveal.
Intelligence before signing
Review intelligence
proposal risktreasury impactprivacy modehistorical outcomes

Private Rooms

Grant reviews, incidents, hiring, and partnerships break down when every sensitive detail is public too early.

Invite members, add a proposal, run a private vote, reveal the outcome, and export proof.

Review intelligence

Treasury Coordination

Treasury actions expose strategy, counterparties, and timing before the organization is ready.

Preview route context, coordinate privately, then publish verifiable execution evidence.

Review intelligence
asset contextprice/oracle contextroute riskcounterparty review

Private Payments & Payroll

Contributor payouts, payroll, and vendor payments should not become public spreadsheets.

Prepare private payout, payroll, or REFHE proof lanes with wallet-first Testnet receipts.

Review intelligence
recipient privacypayout policyreceipt boundarypayroll integrity
Private payoutPayroll flowREFHE proof

Intelligence Before Signing

Members sign governance and treasury actions without enough context, or send sensitive context to hosted AI.

Use QVAC/local intelligence, risk context, and provider-safe analysis before the private vote.
Intelligence before signing
Review intelligence
QVAC local modeprovider router statusdata sent disclosureno hidden vote intent

GamingDAO Rewards

Guild rewards, tournaments, and prize pools lose trust when reward decisions and payouts are messy.

Create a tournament, route reward distribution through governance, and keep reward proof visible.
Intelligence before signing
Review intelligence
reward pool policytournament payout riskwinner privacyproof route
Open GamingDAOCreate tournamentReward treasury

Provider & Growth Rails

Provider integrations become noise when users cannot see the action they enable.

Use Torque, SDK/API starter, and proof routes as backend rails under simple execution flows.

Review intelligence
provider statusAPI availabilitygrowth event policyexecution receipt
Torque growth loopSDK/API starterProof center
PrivateDAO is confidential coordination infrastructure for organizations on Solana, connecting private operations to verifiable outcomes.
Developed in public through github.com/X-PACT/PrivateDAO with product proof, runtime evidence, and final security hardening moving in parallel.

© PrivateDAO. Core source remains open where the repository license applies. Brand, product design, documentation, digital evidence, and official deployments are reserved; official-looking derivative deployments, service packaging, or commercial use require written coordination through official PrivateDAO channels.
